user.title: Configure Felicity Solar BMS Bridge
user.description: Enter the host and port where the local felicity-bms-bridge REST API is running.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the Felicity BMS Bridge service. Make sure the service is running and accessible.
error.invalid_bridge_response: The bridge service returned an invalid response. Please check bridge logs.

abort.already_configured: An integration entry with this host and port is already configured.
